title: Unakkena Naan Song Lyrics Kadhalil Vizhunthen
stanzas:
unadhuyiraai enadhuyirum
ulavida thudikkudhe
thani oru naan
thani oru nee
ninaikavum valikkudhe

idhayathai edharkkaga
edharkaga idam maatrinaai
inikkum oru thunbathai
kudi yaetrinaai.

pudhumaigal thandhu
magizhichiyil ennai aaltha
parisugal thaedi pidippaai

kasandhidum seidhi vandhal
pagirndhida pakkam iruppaai
noiyena konjam paduthaal
thaaiyena maari anaippaai

aruginil vaa aruginil vaa
idaiveli valikkudhe
unadhuyiril enadhhuyirai
ootri thudikkudhe

naan enil nee
nee enil naan
ninaidhida pidikkudhe

mazhai veyil kaatrodu
boogambam vandhaalume
unadhu madhi naan
thoongum veedaagume

enakena edhuvum seithaai
unakenna enna naan seiven
pongidum nenjin unarvai
sollavum vaarthai podhaathe
vizhigalin oram thulirkum
oru thuli neerey sollatum

seo.title: Unakkena Naan Song Lyrics Kadhalil Vizhunthen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Unakkena Naan?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the plot context of Kadhalil Vizhunthen related to this song?

This song plays a crucial role in depicting the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ramya NSK and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was Unakkena Naan released?

The song was released on September 26, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakkena Naan, the protagonist expresses profound emotions of love and yearning, encapsulating the essence of romantic relationships. The soothing melody, paired with heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This song serves as a pivotal moment in Kadhalil Vizhunthen, enhancing the film's romantic narrative. The combination of Ramya NSK's captivating voice and Vijay Antony's masterful composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkena Naan from Kadhalil Vizhunthen is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Ramya NSK's enchanting vocals and Vijay Antony's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics and let the soothing vibes take you on an emotional journey.
stanzaMeanings: You think of me as I think of you.
I feel your presence in my body and soul.
Your life and my life are connected, and I feel it deeply.
You changed your heart for a reason, and now you carry a burden.
You brought new joys and made me seek happiness in my troubles.
When bad news comes, you are there to share it; a little pain can change everything.
I have fallen in love with your love.
Come closer, come closer; your presence makes my heart beat.
If I think of you, you think of me too.
A new world and a new rhythm are created by you.
Even if rain and sunshine come together, I will sleep in your thoughts.
When you come close and sing softly, it calms me down.
If you change your face, it will bring a new charm.
In the midst of everything, I will also forget myself.
I have fallen in love with your love.
Even if death scares us, we will live together.
We have crossed the boundaries of humanity; now we will never be apart.
You have done everything for me; I will not let my heart speak out loud.
Your love has made me fall.
You think of me as I think of you.
